title: Introducing Cursor for iOS
summary: Cursor has released an iOS app enabling developers to build code from anywhere using always-on cloud agents or by remotely controlling agents on their computer. The mobile app extends Cursor's AI-assisted code editing to iOS devices.
writeup: Cursor announces an iOS app that brings its AI-assisted code editing to mobile devices. The app supports two modes: always-on cloud agents that run independently and remote control of agents already running on a personal computer. The result is a way to direct coding agents and build code away from a desk, extending Cursor's existing development workflow to iPhone.
